title: sedum telephium var. assurgens
intro: Sedum telephium var. assurgens, also known as Red-stemmed Sedum or Dragon's Blood, is a perennial succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Sedum telephium var. assurgens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
